arts.sum: Inter Milan are looking to bolster their squad following the departures of Tomás Palacios to Monza and Tajon Buchanan's imminent move to Villarreal. The club's focus has shifted to strengthening their wide positions rather than central defence, still hoping for Acerbi's recovery. arts.ttl: Roma’s Ranieri: “Hermoso? He Rightly Wants to Play, and I Can’t Guarantee That to Anyone”
arts.sum: Roma are gearing up for their final match in the first phase of the UEFA Europa League against Eintracht Frankfurt, a standout performer in this part of the competition. arts.ttl: Europa League | Roma v Frankfurt: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the UEFA Europa League league phase reaches its climactic finale, Roma find themselves in a precarious position as they prepare to host Eintracht Frankfurt at the Stadio Olimpico on Thursday evening. The stakes could not be higher for the Giallorossi, who must secure a victory to guarantee their progression to the knockout rounds. arts.ttl: Roma Linked to Decorated Manchester United Midfielder
arts.sum: Claudio Ranieri has leaned heavily on Leandro Paredes, but Roma aren’t yet certain he’ll stay, both in January and especially next summer, and have earmarked Casemiro should they need a new man at the position.
